description:
USB3.0 KVM Switch is a powerful solution for users who need to manage multiple computers and displays efficiently. With the ability to support 3 monitors and 2 computers, this KVM switch allows seamless switching between devices, maximizing productivity and enhancing your workspace.


Product Specifications

1. 8K Triple Monitor KVM Switch allows 2 computers/laptops to share set of keyboard, , and 3 monitors (3 DisplayPort)

2. Support DP 1.4 standards and downward compatibility. 3 monitors output support up to 8K60Hz for extended,mirrored or spliced display（Depends on your computer's graphics card.）;

3. 2 Switching modes: Button switch and wired remote.

4. KVM switch equipped with 3 USB 3.0 ports for USB devices, and with extra Audio Microphone output


installation steps:

1. Insert the DC/5V adapter into the KVM ;

2. Plug the 3*DisplayPort cable into the KVM switch and monitor;(Output)

3. Plug the DisplayPort cable and USB cable into the KVM switch and your computer/laptop (DP cables are not included)(Input)

DP IN 1A +DP IN 1B + DP IN 1C + USB IN 1=PC1

DP IN 2A + DP IN 2B + DP IN 2C + USB IN 2=PC2


Please check whether DP IN 1A, DP IN 1B, DP IN 1C, and USB IN 1 corresponding, and whether DP IN 2A, DP IN 2B, DP IN 2C and USB IN 2 are corresponding. Mixed insertion is not supported.


4. Insert the and keyboard into the KVM switch

5. If needed, you can connect a microphone and audio port


KVM Switch for 3 Monitors and 2 Computers: This KVM switch displayport enables seamless connectivity for 2 computers with 3 DisplayPort monitors. Control all your displays using a single keyboard and , effortlessly switching between Splicing Mode (combined screens), Extended Mode (different images), and Copy Mode (identical displays). Ensure your computers support multi-display with 3 DP ports each for optimal performance.
Stunning 8K60Hz Ultra HD Resolution: Enjoy breathtaking visuals with our KVM Switch Triple Monitor that supports resolutions up to 8K60Hz. It is backward with various 4K resolutions, including 4K240Hz, 4K120Hz, 4K60Hz, 4K30Hz and below. Experience crystal-clear image quality that enhances your gaming and professional scenarios. (Note: Both your computer and monitor must support 8K, and an 8K DP1.4 cable is required for maximum resolution.)
High-Speed USB 3.0 Connectivity: Featuring 3 USB 3.0 ports, this 3 monitor KVM switches allows super-fast data transfer rates of up to 5Gbps. It supports a variety of USB devices, including keyboards, mice, printers, and scanners, while remaining with USB 2.0 peripherals. It also supports separate audio and microphone output, makes work and life easier and more convenient. (For high-power devices like hard disks, an external 5V/2A adapter is necessary.)
Different Switching Methods: Switching between computers is easy with our KVM switch. Use the panel buttons or the wired remote control for effortless operation. LED indicators clearly show the active computer, keeping your workspace organized. Installation is straightforward with plug and play functionality, without any software needed.
Broad Compatibility for Various Devices: Our KVM switch for 3 monitors and 2 computers is designed for versatility. It supports a wide range of devices, including PCs, laptops, and gaming consoles like Xbox. with a variety of computer systems, such as Windows, Linux, Mac, Unix, Ubuntu, Raspberry, and most other major OS. Ideal for office setups, multimedia teaching, and conference rooms, this KVM switch is perfect for both professionals and gamers.

Titan-army - P2712V 27 Inch Gaming Monitor, 4K 160Hz/FHD 320Hz, Fast IPS, 95% DCI-P3, HDR400, Adaptive Sync, VESA Mount

 
 
Dual Mode Switching: 4K@160Hz/FHD@320Hz
The TITAN ARMY P2712V gaming monitor supports one-click dual-mode switching, allowing seamless transitions between 3840×2160@160Hz ultra-high definition and 1920×1080@320Hz high refresh rate modes. Whether adapting to different gaming needs or daily content creation, you can quickly adjust according to your specific needs.

Marvelous Fast IPS Panel & Cinematic Colors
Equipped with a FAST IPS panel, it boasts significantly faster response times than standard IPS panels. This dramatically improves motion clarity, reduces blur, and maintains excellent image quality, vibrant colors, and wide viewing angles. With ΔE<2 color accuracy, 135% sRGB color volume, 95% DCI-P3 color coverage, 8-bit+FRC color depth, and 1.07 billion display colors, the P2712V ensures true-to-life, vibrant hues with rich depth, making every image stand out with stunning clarity.

HDR400 Brightness & Gaming+ Game Assistance
Featuring HDR400 technology, TITAN ARMY’s gaming monitor expands brightness and contrast ranges to intensify color and detail, creating an immersive, cinema-like gaming experience. Designed for gamers, it comes with integrated gaming assistance features, putting critical information and settings easily within reach for effortless operation.

Adaptive Sync & Upgraded Eye Care
Equipped with Adaptive Sync, the monitor synchronizes its refresh rate with the graphics card’s output, eliminating screen tearing and stuttering for smooth gameplay. Upgraded eye care technologies reduce screen flicker and blue light emission, providing gentle protection for your eyes during extended gaming sessions.

12 Smart Scenario Modes & Dual Host Display
With 12 scenario modes, the P2712V allows one-click switching to customized settings for different game genres and viewing preferences, ensuring optimal performance in every scenario. Additionally, it supports picture-in-picture (PIP) and picture-by-picture (PBP) functions, enabling efficient multitasking that balances productivity and entertainment.

Ergonomic Adjustment & RGB Gaming Lighting
The P2712V gaming monitor offers versatile adjustments: tilting from -5° to 20°, pivoting, 100mm height adjustment and 100*100mm VESA wall mounting, allowing you to customize the setup for maximum comfort and visibility. Built-in RGB gaming lighting complements your gameplay, elevating the overall atmosphere and immersing you deeper in the gaming world.

KVM Switch Dual Monitor 4K@60Hz 2K@144Hz 1080P@240Hz 2 Monitor 2 Computer Ultrawide Sceern PC


[513]

Introducing the AV Access KVM Switch Dual Monitor 4K@60Hz – the ultimate solution for seamless multitasking and enhanced productivity.

This item empowers users to control two computers or laptops simultaneously, regardless of their operating system, whether it's Windows, Mac, Chrome, or Linux. With just one set of keyboard and mouse, you can effortlessly switch between devices while enjoying the convenience of two extended or mirrored monitors. Thanks to the Slide Switch for KVM or USB operation mode, your virtual interaction remains smooth, eliminating any flickering during the switch.

Boost your connectivity with the integrated USB 3.0 hub, featuring three high-speed ports. Share USB peripherals such as printers, scanners, webcams, and hard drives between your two computers with lightning-fast data transfer rates of up to 5Gbp/s. Plus, a dedicated USB 1.1 port is available for Hotkey switching, ensuring a seamless transition.

Experience visual excellence with support for high refresh rates of up to 240Hz. This KVM switch enables you to connect dual ultra-wide screens with maximum resolutions of 4096x2160@60Hz, 2560x1440@60Hz/144Hz, and 1080P@240Hz. It also boasts auto-detection and memory functions to preserve your settings in case of power loss. For added convenience, separate audio and microphone ports are at your disposal.

Please note that to achieve dual-monitor output, your host PC must have two HDMI signals connected to the KVM switch. If your PCs only have DP ports, we advise against using a DisplayPort to HDMI cable/adapter for stable screen mirroring.

This versatile product offers two switching methods: a user-friendly front-panel toggle selection and hotkey switches on your keyboard. It's compatible with a wide range of operating systems and devices, ensuring a hassle-free experience across multiple platforms.

Forget about driver installations – our KVM switch is driver-free and features an automatic wake-up function with the included power adapter. Plug and play has never been this easy, offering a perfect gaming experience with zero latency.
